title: Muskan Hospital & Research Centre
addresses: Muskan Hospital & Research Centre Ram Nagar Colony, Chas B. S. City, Jharkhnad - 827013 +91 6542 236186, +91-887-708-0718 Fax : +91 6542 236457 info@muskanhospital.com
text:
Muskan Hospital & Research Centre Ram Nagar Colony, Chas, B.S.City, Jharkhnad (827013) muskanhospital@yahoo.co.in +91 6542 236186-87, +91-9204061814, +91-8877080718 Home About Us Board of Directors Empanelment Panel of Doctors Services Facilities Specialties Gallery Contact Us Home About Us Board of Directors Empanelment Panel of Doctors Services Facilities Specialties Gallery Contact Us Welcome To Muskan Hospital Muskan Hospital & Research Centre is a collective effort with an aim to initiate a hospital-project with
						various facilities under one roof.
						It has been established with a vision to become a leader in the field of integrated health care.
						Inaugurated with 40 beds on 15 th November 2005 it has become 120 beds hospital now, of which about 16 beds are dedicated to ICU Care & 20 beds for NICU Care. Muskan Hospital is on panel of imminent Corporate for indoor treatment & medical services.
						We have designed package of corporate health services to ensure that employees of its corporate
						clients stay healthy and productive. The aim is to impart expert health advice and ensure that medical. Read More... Facilities Available Dialysis & Blood Gas Analyzer, Hormone Analyzer (Chemiilluscence Technique, BECKMAN & COLTER)
								– First Time in Bokaro, in any Private Setup. 120 Bedded multi-specialty hospital with 16 Bedded ICCU, Six Bedded HDU, 20 Bedded NICU, AC Rooms,
								Non AC Rooms & General Ward. ICCU with Multi-para Monitors, Infusion pump on each bed, incorporated with Defibrillator &
								Ventilator with all new modes of CPAP & BIPAP and specially suited for Poisoning &
								Critically ill patients and Chemotherapy. Centralized Oxygen Supply, Central Suction & Compressed Air to each bed. State of the Art Operation Theater where all sorts of Laparoscopic Surgeries & TURP are done. Well equipped 20 Bedded NICU with Incubators, Photo-therapy Units, Radiant Warmers, Pulse
								Oximeters and Neonatal Ventilator with Bubble C-Pap. Read More... Careers with Muskan We are hiring for following posts : RMO (MBBS, BAMS) Paediatrician (MD / DCH / DNB) Radiologist / Sonologist (MD / DMRD / DNB / PCPNDT Qualified) Testimonials Muskan Hospital has some of the best medical facilities in Jharkhand especially in
									neonatal care. You people are really making people smile and making lives happier. Thank you. Anand Kumar - Patient's Guardian A great team of doctors and support staff. Keep up the good work. S. Kumar - Doctor Very few hospitals have all kinds of medical facilities with world class equipments
									under one roof... and Muskan Hospital is one of them. Md. Hasan Raza - Patient 24x7 Ambulance Our ambulance services provide 24x7 support with the motto - "Let distance not come between patient and treatment" Medical Insurance We are one of the few authorized hospitals in Bokaro for All Major Medical Insurance Companies ICU & NICU Specially Granted Hospital under Chief - Minister's "Janani Shishu Swasthya" program for mother and infant care Security & Privacy We give utmost priority to the privacy and security of out patients. Security is viewed on close circuit cameras. Get in touch Join our mailing list to stay up to date! Our Specialties Gastroenterology Paediatrics & Neonatology Critical Care Orthopedics & Trauma General & ONCO Surgery Facilities Dialysis & Blood Gas Analyzer Child Health & Vaccination Clinic UGI Endoscopy, Colonoscopy & ERCP Laparoscopic Surgeries & TURP Spiral CT Scan, TMT, Holter Monitoring Contact Us Muskan Hospital & Research Centre Ram Nagar Colony, Chas B.
